audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in compare.c are guarded: `ber` is null-checked after allocation (L54); `ld` and `msgidp` are covered by assert-preconditions in `ldap_compare_ext` (L111, L115), verified for both callers of `ldap_build_compare_req`. The `value == NULL` case in `ldap_compare`/`ldap_compare_s` (L149-152, L192-194) is safe because `ber_put_berval` takes the `bv_len == 0` branch (liblber/encode.c:258) and uses `""` without reading `bv_val`. No pointer is dereferenced in compare.c without prior non-null assurance.
